feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1892 201 1691 81
TR 1743 172 1571 66

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.
Ranking App Number of Discounts
1 Cry Translator
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：1
2 Machinarium
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：1
3 Only You Are Here
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：1
4 60 Parsecs!
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：1
5 Card.Note - 多彩卡片笔记
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：0
  • In-App Purchases
    1. Card.Note Premiun：1
6 20 Minutes Till Dawn:Premium
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：1
7 Halls of Torment: Premium
  • Total Times：1
  • Price：1

entry.title: Card.Note - 多彩卡片笔记
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Card.Note Premiun：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺29,99 ~ ₺99,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Card.Note Premiun：₺49,99

Application Description

Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ； 你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。 你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒； 还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。 「Card.Note」九大特点： 1.极简设计 循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。 2.文青定制 精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。 3.全局卡片化 充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。 4.全局手势化 下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。 5.语音录入 打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。 6.要事提醒： 可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。 7.快捷高效 支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。 8.iCloud云同步 支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。 9.深色模式 全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。 感谢下载，生活愉快。 如有问题或建议，请联系开发者 微博：土味文艺开发者 邮箱：yande18@126.com

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Only You Are Here
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺19,99 → ₺2,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺19,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺2,99

In-App Purchases

  • "Time"：₺29,99
  • Donation I：₺49,99
  • Donation II：₺99,99
  • Donation III：₺249,99

Application Description

Only You Are Here — an atmospheric adventure with first-person horror elements. Take on the role of a person trapped inside their dream. This place is filled with a mix of memories and nightmares. To get out, you have to open a small door. Immerse yourself in the game's history, walk through many endings, and discover the key secret.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 20 Minutes Till Dawn:Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Survive the onslaught of an endless horde of monsters for 20 minutes! 20 Minutes Till Dawn is a roguelike, shoot'em up where you mow down endless hordes of monstrous baddies. 【Unique Builds Every Run】 In this roguelite survival game, select from a variety of upgrades to create a unique and overpowered builds every run. You can be a fire wizard, for example, and ignite monsters with every pump of your shotgun, or an agile ninja who controls magic knives to pierce your enemies. 【Select Your Hero】 Choose from a diverse selection of characters and weapons that offer a variety of gameplay experiences. 【Features】 *Over 80 different upgrades to choose from for a unique experience every run! *Wide cast of characters, with more to come post-launch. *Casual quick 10-20 minute play sessions, for busy gamers. *Rune System helps you become stronger 【Contact Us】 Discord: https://discord.gg/efTYchSsHZ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Erabitstudios Twitter: https://twitter.com/erabit_studios

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Cry Translator
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

With the Cry Translator, you’ll quickly understand what your baby needs! This award-winning program takes a look at your baby’s cry and gives you the reason of crying in just under 5 seconds. Is your baby hungry, tired, upset, stressed, or just plain bored? The Cry Translator will let you know.

entry.title: Machinarium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Machinarium is the award-winning independent adventure game developed by the makers of Samorost series, Botanicula and CHUCHEL. Help Josef the robot to save his girlfriend Berta kidnapped by the Black Cap Brotherhood gang. "Absolutely Fantastic" - TouchArcade 4/4 - USA TODAY 4/4 - SlideToPlay 9/10 - Pocket Gamer Awards: - IGF, Excellence in Visual Art Award - Gamasutra, Best Indie Game Of The Year - VGChartz.com, Best Indie Game Of The Year

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Halls of Torment: Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺129,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • The Boglands DLC：₺149,99
  • Supporter Pack：₺49,99

Application Description

Halls of Torment is a horde survival game with a pre-rendered retro look reminiscent of RPGs from the late 90s. Choose one of many hero characters and descend into the deadly Halls of Torment. Fight unholy horrors from beyond and survive wave after wave of enemies until you face one of the tormented Lords. Strengthen your hero with character traits, abilities, and items. Create a new powerful build during each run. Explore various underground expanses and find new powerful items that enable you to venture even deeper into the abyss. First available on Steam, the 90's-style RPG survival roguelike, Halls of Torment, is now making its debut on mobile! 【Features】 ◆ Quick and casual 30 minute runs ◆ Old school pre-rendered art style ◆ Quest-based meta progression ◆ Large selection of diverse abilities, traits, and items, all enabling you to create interesting synergies ◆ Diverse bosses featuring unique mechanics and attack patterns ◆ Several distinct characters allowing for many different play styles ◆ Unlock and explore multiple interesting and challenging underground worlds ◆ Unique items can be sent up to the overworld and used to customize future runs ◆ Craft magical tinctures to direct fate in your favor ◆ Unlock the power of each class and combine them with your chosen character ◆ Find rare item variants to further improve your builds 【Full Content List】 ◆6 stages with unique environments ◆13 playable characters & character marks ◆20+ blessings that make you stronger for each run ◆80+ unique items to retrieve and unlock ◆240 higher rarity item variants ◆80+ abilities and ability upgrades ◆40+ artifacts to customize your game experience ◆35+ unique bosses ◆70+ unique monsters ◆500 quests to complete ◆1000+ traits that upgrade characters and abilities Our content list is still growing, expect more in the future! 【Contact Us】 Discord: @Erabit or join via https://discord.gg/Gkje2gzCqB Email: prglobal@erabitstudios.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 60 Parsecs!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Atomic Space Age was a blast! Until it became the Post-Apocalyptic Space Age. Your space station is about to explode and you only have 60 seconds before things get messy. What (or who) will you grab before you make a mad dash for the emergency shuttle and begin your journey into THE GREAT UNKNOWN? This is 60 Parsecs!, a dark comedy sci-fi adventure set in the Atomic Space Age - complete with all the Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated wall accents and cockroaches with space helmets. Lead a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts, equipped with whatever junk - sorry - "supplies" you can grab before blasting off, on a journey across the cosmos that's best described as misguided. Make the best of it, while dealing with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive? Bon voyage! SCAVENGE & EVACUATE With only 60 seconds before nukes reduce the space station to floating particles in the vacuum of space, frantically grab whatever supplies and crew you can before getting out of there. You never know when that sock puppet will come in handy. SURVIVE & DECIDE Space funerals are inconvenient, so try to avoid dying where possible. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not limited) wits to make difficult choices and ensure your survival, even though the odds are definitely stacked against you. EXPLORE & CRAFT Duct tape fixes all problems, but how do you fix (or at least craft) duct tape? Chart expeditions to find resources, craft survival essentials and explore strange new worlds in a procedural, very-much-permadeath adventure. LEAD & PROTECT As captain, it's your duty to keep the crew happy - they're less likely to kill you that way. Manage relationships as you watch them grow closer and hopefully not throw each other out the airlock.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Seoul Exorcist 1111: Roguelite
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺199,99 [₺40,00 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

In-App Purchases

  • 200,000 x Coins：₺499,99
  • 80,000 x Coins：₺249,99
  • 40,000 x Coins：₺149,99
  • 10,000 x Coins：₺49,99

Application Description

Think Fast, Strike Faster! As the ultimate exorcist, choose your attacks wisely, upgrade combat deck, combine traits and items, and save the cursed souls—before death finds you. ▪ Real-Time Turn-Based Combat Enemies react the moment you make a decision—! Fast, tense action with every move. ▪ 4 Characters with Unique Strategies Each with 8 uniques attack types, exclusive animations, and 2 passive traits. Adapt your playstyle for every run. ▪ Time Limit - Think Fast, Strike Faster! You have just 7 minutes to defeat all enemies in each run. You've been relentlessly trained for this moment. ▪ Item & Trait Combinations Strategic synergies that activate automatically during battle. Timing and adaptability are the keys to victory! ▪ Roguelite Clear all 7 maps and the boss in a single run—or get reset! But clearing the same map 3 times unlocks progress. Collect coins, build a stronger deck, and dive back in! ▪ 12 Languages Supported  Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, and Russian. ▪ Offline Game All data is stored locally. No network required. Be Aware. Uninstalling the app will erase saved data. ▪Discord https://discord.gg/UaZApdWG93 ▪For inquires / bug report snowgames0629@gmail.com

entry.title: Dead Cells
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺199,99 [₺199,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

In-App Purchases

  • The Bad Seed：₺199,99
  • Fatal Falls：₺199,99
  • QUEEN AND THE SEA DLC：₺199,99
  • Return to Castlevania：₺399,99

Application Description

Death is not the end. Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers. Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss. Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat. First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile! Main Features • Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath • Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette” • Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right? • Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end? *Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near* RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC Time for some vampire slaying • New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont, • 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts • 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you • 14 new weapons - wield the Vampire Killer or the Holy Water to defeat creatures of the night, • 3 new bosses - go fangs to fangs against Death and Dracula himself • 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard • Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells THE BAD SEED DLC You reap what you sow • New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished • New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter • New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki • New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you FATAL FALLS DLC Ready for a leap of faith? • 3 new biomes - Get some fresh air at the Fractured Shrines, splash around at the Undying Shores and take a picture at the Mausoleum • 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...? • 7 new weapons - Lil' Serenade is perfect for breaking the ice with the locals, although the Snake Fangs would make for a perfect souvenir... • 1 new boss - The Scarecrow is very proud of his gardening skills and won't hesitate to show off QUEEN AND THE SEA DLC Take it to the sea! • 2 new biomes - Battle your way through a rotten shipwreck, or scale a burning lighthouse and confront your deadliest foe yet. • 9 new weapons, including a throwable shark, a trident and a pirate hook hand (eyepatch not included). • 2 new bosses - Don't lose your head before you meet the Queen! This DLC also gives you the usual extras: - A not-so-cute pet. - Loads of new outfits. - New enemies to bash. WARNING: Devices with less than 2 Gb of RAM may not be able to run this content correctly. We recommend not to take this DLC if your device is under 2gb of RAM. Carefully redesigned for mobile with a revamped interface • Two game modes available: Original & Auto-Hit • Custom controls & More touch controls options available: Change the buttons’ position and size to your liking, swipe to dodge… • MFi external controller support • No ads, no F2P mechanics! If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com with as much information as possible on the issue.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Code Blue – CPR & ALS Timer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ALS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters. Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes. Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow. ### Core Features ### DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS - Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals - High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded REAL-TIME EVENT LOG - Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions - Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING - Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality ### Fully Customizable for Your Practice ### CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES - Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS Configure the app as a simple CPR timer Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour ### First Responder & Post-Code Tools ### FIRST RESPONDER MODE - Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest - Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT - Save previous codes - Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review ### Evidence-Based Flowcharts ### ALS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES - Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts - Based on ALS and Post-Resuscitation Care guidelines from AHA and ERC ### Built for Healthcare Professionals ### Designed for use in: - Emergency Departments - ICUs - Wards - Prehospital and first-responder settings Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation. ### Support & Legal ### For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact: Customer Support: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy End User License Agreement (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Dwarf Fortress Remote
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Server Subscription：₺18,99

Application Description

Dwarf Fortress is a famous fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games. This app allows you to play Fortress Mode remotely on your mobile device. Dwarf Fortress is an open-ended fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games, which is in constant development since 2002. In Fortress mode, player indirectly controls a group of dwarves, attempting to construct a successful and wealthy fortress. The game features a highly detailed procedurally generated fantasy world with multiple civilizations and wildlife, realistic geology, weather effects. You will have dozens of different building and items to construct, hundreds of materials, advanced military system, agriculture, sieges and underground monsters, diplomacy and trading. ATTENTION: Internet connection is required to play. The original game with a plugin (both free) running at your home or on a cloud server will be required, visit mifki.com/df/setup for details. Alternatively, you can purchase a server subscription from within the app, in which case we will manage a server for you, visit mifki.com/df/subscription for details. Supported Dwarf Fortress version is 0.47.05. Visit bay12games.com/dwarves for full information about Dwarf Fortress. However, please report any issues with this application to mifki.com/df/support and NOT to the original game authors.

entry.title: Waterlogue: Photo to Painting
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：₺1.499,99 → ₺1.299,99 [₺999,99 ~ ₺1.499,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Monthly)：₺199,99
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Yearly)：₺499,99
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：₺1.299,99

Application Description

You don’t need to paint to create beautiful watercolor images—Waterlogue captures the essence of your photos in brilliant, liquid color. See the world like an artist. FEATURES: • Create art that looks hand-painted • Photos become luminous watercolors in seconds • Expressive styles for portraits, landscapes, and more • Beautiful results for people and pets • Print-quality export for frameable art • Simulated watercolor, not AI • Private by design—your photos never leave your device • Customize borders, lightness, and detail ACCLAIM: • Over one million sold since 2013 • Awarded "App Store Best of 2014" by Apple • Featured as App Store App of the Day • Oprah's holiday pick! "Made with Love: DIY Gifts"—O, The Oprah Magazine • “…with Waterlogue, it’s clear that there’s a very thoughtful human touch behind the app’s painterly algorithms.” —WIRED • “…Waterlogue is going to utterly amaze you, as it’s the first app I’ve seen that gives results that really look like a watercolor painting.” —Cult of Mac • “Watercolor apps may not be a new idea, but Waterlogue does it in a gorgeous, intuitive way, and it’s quite a pleasure to use.” —AppAdvice.com • “It goes beyond typical Photoshop watercolor filters because it has more visual intelligence, and more of the feel of the real paint.” —James Gurney, Artist and Author of Dinotopia • From Tinrocket, creator of This by Tinrocket (App Store Best of 2016), Olli (App Store Best of 2017), and more KEEP UP WITH TINROCKET: • Follow @Tinrocket on Instagram for the latest! • We’re here to help: If you have a question or need assistance, you can always email us at support@tinrocket.com • If you like Waterlogue, please consider leaving an App Store review or rating. Every review counts and helps indie developers like ourselves. Waterlogue® and See the world like an artist® are registered trademarks of Tinrocket, LLC

entry.title: Knight & Dragon IV
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Rare drops! Class changes! And an epic story. The 4th installment of the hardcore Hack & Slash RPG "Knight & Dragon," packed with replay value! "Knight & Dragon 4" is the fourth title in this Hack & Slash RPG series built within a medieval fantasy world. The story takes place about 30 years prior to the events of the previous game, III. The setting is the "Hundred Years' War" between the great Lindar Empire and the Kingdom of Langheim, one of the Eldorua kingdoms. The journey begins in a refugee camp located near the border of these two great powers. In a world swirling with conspiracy, people from all walks of life are swept up in the chaos of war. The stories of their respective knights and dragons eventually converge toward a single conclusion. Enjoy an epic narrative featuring characters from previous titles. [Features of Knight & Dragon 4] * Heated Real-Time Battles: The core systems of a "replayable RPG," such as rare item drops and class changes, follow the beloved formula of previous titles! * Expanded Party Size: You can now battle with a party of 6 members. Time pauses while selecting commands, allowing for more intuitive control! * Deep Strategic Gameplay: With new systems like "Formations" and "Skill Chaining," the battle system is more refined, offering even more depth and replayability! * New Jobs Added: With the addition of the "Beast Tamer" and "Gladiator," there are now 8 jobs in total. New skills have also been added to complement existing jobs! * Revamped World: A completely renewed world map to color the epic story. Of course, post-game content is included! * Legacy Content: Many characters from the previous game appear, with significant text additions that supplement the scenarios of the past titles! * Classic Features: Popular basic functions from the previous game, such as Party Dispatch, Persona functions, and Equipment Enhancement/Customization, are all here! ... If you would like to experience the atmosphere of the game before purchasing, the previous title "Knight & Dragon" is available completely free of charge, so please give it a try. Official Website http://dgjam.com/knightdragon4

entry.title: Knight & Dragon III
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺29,99 [₺29,99 ~ ₺179,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺29,99

Application Description

Rare Items! Class Change! And an epic story. The third installment of the full-fledged hack-and-slash RPG "Knight and Dragon," packed with replayability! "Knight and Dragon 3" is the third installment in the hack-and-slash RPG series set in a medieval fantasy world. One morning, after receiving a certificate from an elderly gentleman, proving you as a full-fledged guild member, you are sent to a small village in the Republic of Gringard. This is where the story begins. Various incidents occurring in the Republic, the conflicts with the neighboring Lindahl Empire, and the story of knights and dragons will eventually involve you in a grand destiny revolving around the stars. [Features of Knight and Dragon 3] ▽ The basic systems of a replayable RPG such as intense real-time battles, rare item drops, and class changes are inherited from the previous game! ▽ Real-time battles are now more interactive, allowing you to dodge, parry, and counter by reading the enemy’s attack timings! ▽ A variety of weapons like axes, spears, and halberds appear among the items! Additionally, you can create characters to your liking, including dual-wielding and two-handed weapons! ▽ A world map that enhances the epic story is introduced! The story, with even more volume than the previous game, and the end content are still going strong! ▽ Moreover, in this game, a diverse range of NPCs with unique characteristics, place names, city names, and other proper nouns depict the grand story! ▽ Other features such as party dispatch and the Persona function, which were well received in the previous game, are of course continued! ・・・ For those who want to get a feel for the game before purchasing, the previous game "Knight and Dragon" is completely free to enjoy, so please give it a try. Official Homepage http://dgjam.com/knightdragon3

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Art of Rally
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺399,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • art of rally: australia dlc：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺99,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • art of rally: australia dlc：₺49,99

Application Description

Race across the world through colorful and stylized environments in top-down view. Compete for first place in the leaderboards with daily and weekly challenges. Will you master the art of rally? Experience the golden era of rally in Career mode, traveling across 78 stages from Finland to Sardinia, Norway, Japan, Germany, Kenya and Indonesia. Get behind the wheel of your favorite vintage cars, ranging from the 60’s to the 80’s, Group B, Group S and Group A. From beginner-friendly options to driving modes that’ll challenge the most expert drivers, all players can tackle the races using their favorite rally driving tricks: Scandinavian flick, counter steering, left foot braking, handbrake turns. Get your name out at the top of the Leaderboard in our daily and weekly challenges. Show off your driving skills, or simply your favourite landscapes, with the integrated Photo and Replay mode.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Neo Monsters
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 13 Gems：₺399,99
  • 1 Gem：₺49,99
  • 6 Gems：₺199,99
  • 48 Gems：₺1.499,99
  • 74 Gems：₺2.299,99
  • 150 Gems：₺3.999,99
  • 28 Gems：₺799,99

Application Description

Become a Legend! Capture over 2000 Animated Monsters and Duel in Real-Time PvP! Form your team and battle for victory! Capture, train, and evolve to become the champion in one of the biggest monster battling RPGs! Neo Monsters is an addictive strategy RPG that features epic 4v4 battles between two teams of up to 16 monsters. The unique turn-based battle system allows you to come up with powerful chain strategies by combining hundreds of abilities. Hunt down the strongest monsters and harness their power, then take the battle online to dominate in exciting PvP battles and leagues! Are you ready to take the challenge? ▶Features: ● Build your Monster Collection • Capture and evolve over 1000 fully animated monsters! • Train your monsters and unleash their deadly potential. • Collect evolution ingredients to create the ultimate power! ● Form a Battle Strategy • Build the ultimate team of up to 16 monsters. • Defeat your opponents in epic turn-based 4v4 battles! • Create devastating combinations from hundreds of abilities. ● Become the Champion • Conquer six Leagues and take on the Grand Champion in 60+ hours of adventure! • Explore multiple islands and dungeons on your journey. • Follow the story to uncover the truth behind your late uncle’s atrocity. ● Take the Battle Online • Duel players from around the world in PvP leagues! • Complete 100+ online missions. • Take on weekly updated events to unlock big rewards. Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NeoMonstersOfficial/ Join the Neo Monsters community: http://www.neomonstersforum.com/ Issues or questions? Contact our support: neomonsupport.gameplay@zigzagame.net Terms of Service: https://www.zigzagame.com/terms/ Privacy Policy: https://www.zigzagame.com/privacy-policy/
